title: Origins: Extra Classes
description: An addon for the Origins: Classes mod that adds 4 new classes
body:
# Requires Origins: Classes

 

Adds four new classes to the game

Click the image below to be taken to [Bisect's website](https://bisecthosting.com/lankaster)
[![Bisect hosting partner link](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/95a46c7df6cc1b524fce336fbdaeee54f0703c1c_0.webp)](https://bisecthosting.com/lankaster)

 

**Barbarian**

Sharper axes: axes 3 deal more damage

Bloodlust: killing multiple enemies in a row will grant positive effects

Simpleminded: cannot use an enchanting table

 

**Spellsword**

Sword magic: each sword has a special effect applied to them

Better enchanting: enchanting will produce better enchants 

Weak legs: take 1.2 times fall damage, move slower in heavy armor

 

**Nymph**

Forest home: regen in forest-like biomes

Bountiful harvest: chance for double crops

Natureless: weakness in nether or end

 

**Scavenger**

Scavenger: Find loot hidden in dirt and sand

Thorough: Find better loot in chest and from mobs
